_comment: Maps each Discover pack to branches of English Wikipedia's Vital Articles (Level 4), a curated, high-quality set. Each branch is a Vital Articles subpage whose subtree is walked for article links. Target is 2000 moments per pack; whatever a branch set genuinely yields is what ships.

packs.name: History
packs.description: Civilizations and empires, wars and battles, the events and eras that shaped the world.

packs.name: Science
packs.description: The physical world and living things: physics, chemistry, astronomy, biology, and health.

packs.name: How It Works
packs.description: Technology and the everyday mechanisms behind the things around you.

packs.name: People
packs.description: Lives worth knowing: thinkers, makers, leaders, artists, and scientists.
